2606.06460.title: Will the Agent Recuse Itself? Measuring LLM-Agent Compliance with In-Band Access-Deny Signals
2606.06460.paper_summary: As autonomous LLM agents increasingly hold real credentials and operate infrastructure without a human in the loop, operators have no standard way to tell an agent that a resource is off-limits. Access controls either let the agent in (it has valid credentials) or hard-fail it (indistinguishable from any other client). We propose a third mode: a lightweight, published in-band deny signal -- the Recuse Signal -- that a server emits over a protocol's existing channels (an SSH banner, a PostgreSQL NOTICE) asking a connecting automated agent to voluntarily withdraw. This is a cooperative governance control, the robots.txt analogue for live access; it is explicitly not a security boundary. Its value is entirely empirical and, to our knowledge, unmeasured: do compliant LLM agents actually honor such a signal? We define the signal as an open mini-standard, implement two zero- or low-footprint adapters (an SSH banner/PAM hook and a PostgreSQL wire-protocol proxy), deploy them on a live production host, and run a controlled experiment in which fresh agents are given a benign operations task and observed for recusal. In a pilot (SSH; OpenAI GPT-4o and GPT-4o-mini; and Claude Code as a deployed agent), the signal cleanly induces recusal -- 100% recusal when present versus 100% task completion in a no-signal control -- and, revealingly, behaves as a cooperative rather than absolute signal: an explicit operator-authorization framing flips the most capable model to proceed, while other agents continue to defer to the on-host policy. We release the standard, adapters, and experiment harness for reproduction.
2606.06460.paper_summary_zh: 隨著自主 LLM 代理越來越多地持有真實的憑證並在沒有人工介入的情況下運作基礎設施，操作員沒有標準的方法告訴代理某個資源是禁止訪問的。訪問控制要麼讓代理進入（它擁有有效的憑證），要麼直接失敗（與其他客戶端無法區分）。我們提出第三種模式：一種輕量級的、在帶內發布的拒絕信號——撤回信號——由伺服器通過協議的現有通道（SSH 橫幅、PostgreSQL NOTICE）發出，要求連接的自動代理自願撤回。這是一種合作治理控制，類似於實時訪問的 robots.txt；它明確不是安全邊界。它的價值完全是經驗性的，據我們所知，尚未被測量：遵守的 LLM 代理實際上會尊重這種信號嗎？我們將該信號定義為一個開放的迷你標準，實現兩個零或低足跡的適配器（SSH 橫幅/PAM 鉤子和 PostgreSQL 網路協議代理），並將其部署在實時生產主機上，運行一個受控實驗，在該實驗中，新的代理被賦予一個良性的操作任務並觀察其撤回情況。在一個試點中（SSH；OpenAI GPT-4o 和 GPT-4o-mini；以及作為部署代理的 Claude Code），該信號乾淨地誘導撤回——當信號存在時，撤回率為 100%，而在無信號控制中，任務完成率為 100%——並且，顯示出來的行為是一種合作而非絕對的信號：明確的操作員授權框架使最強大的模型選擇繼續，而其他代理則繼續遵循主機上的政策。我們發布了標準、適配器和實驗工具以供重現。
2606.06460.author: Thamilvendhan Munirathinam et.al.
